question: List the details for all the pairs of teachers and students who are in the same class.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.bio_data, s.student_details, t.teacher_id, t.teacher_details FROM Students s JOIN Classes c ON s.student_id = c.student_id JOIN Teachers t ON c.teacher_id = t.teacher_id;

back_translation.intent: 获取学生及其相关教师的信息

semantic.reason: 缺少将教师和学生通过班级关联的连接条件，目标表未明确说明关联逻辑
